ev-dragon-encounter-switch: fem-alert-su.text:
You find the dragon...

Her emerald eyes, wide open and attentive...

Your words and confidence puffs out of existance...

As you stare your fears, while she judges you.

ops.text:
"I.. I.. I'm a k-knight...

I-I'm here f-for your...

F-For your p-pressence..."

I try to make words come out, and try to avoid my nut to come out...

From the humiliation I'm putting myself though...

I simply melt in silence under her gaze.

I want nothing more than her to put me in my place, and take the lead...

ev-dragon-encounter-switch: fem-alert-do.text:
You find the dragon...

Her emerald eyes, wide open and attentive, met with yours...

The size means nothing, even towering over you, you don't flinch
even a little...

ops.text:
You stand there with your back strainght...

And a song in your heart, that is ready to come out...

I can see in her eyes...

And I recognize the intensity and desire behind them...

She is in heat and can't hide it...

ev-dragon-encounter-switch: fem-notalert.text:
Her shape raises and falls in a slow rhitmic slumber...

Her towering shape is enough to make your knees weak...

ops.text:
I will not back down now!

I get my lungs filled with air and I wisper!

"h-hello... are... you.. awake... ?"

I see her sleeping shape and I get overexited.

I get to have her sleeping body.

(Sleep kink)

ev-dragon-encounter-switch: fem-notalert.text:
Her shape raises and falls in a slow rhitmic slumber...

Her towering shape is contrasted by her vulnerability...

ops.text:
I'll use the strength of my voice to convey my message!.

"MIGHTY DRAGON HEAR MY PLEA!"

Don't thinkg that a well trained adventurer like me would let this slide...

I have hightened sences and can percieve more than the average human!

She is in heat, I'll wake her  up with my dick!
